'''Kichicolia''' were sociable, [[Diet/Legends|herbivorous]] [[Primate/Legends|primates]] native to [[Najarka]] discovered by the [[Imperial Zoological Agency]]. Their call was a loud trilling squawk. A number were taken to [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] gardens on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and [[Kailor V]]; the breeding pairs sent to Palpatine's gardens had their vocal cords removed so as not to annoy the Emperor's guests.
